# Docs Structure

Generated public docs live under `docs/`:

```txt
docs/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ packs/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ by-domain/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <domain>/<pack-id>.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ skills/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ by-domain/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ by-source/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <2-char-prefix>/<skill-id>.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ sources/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <source-id>.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ domains/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <domain-id>.md
в””в”Ђв”Ђ reports/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ README.md
```

Every generated Markdown file must begin with:

```md
<!-- GENERATED BY catalog-publishing. DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY. -->
```

Then include machine-readable frontmatter with `generated`, `generator`, `source_type`, `source_id`, `source_record`, `source_hash`, `catalog_hash`, and `generated_at` when applicable.
